item.title: English-Speaking Psychologist Brussels | Philippe Jacquet
item.description: Psychotherapy and counselling Brussels - Philippe Jacquet & Associates Addiction Counselling Brussels Depression Counselling Brussels Eating Disorder Treatment in Brussels Sexual addiction counselling in Brussels Gambling Addiction Counselling Brussels Psychotherapy Workshops Brussels About Our Brussels Office Psychotherapy is not just one particular way of working with and treating clients. Instead, psychotherapy is an integrated, holistic way to approach the issues that have brought the client in to seek help and support.

item.title: Psychotherapist Marbella Spain | Philippe Jacquet & Associates
item.description: Psychotherapy Marbella - Philippe Jacquet & Associates Psychotherapy Marbella Practice Marbella Workshops Marbella Life Coaching Services Welcome to Marbella Office Maximizing Potential Through Executive Coaching Counselling and Therapy Services In every life, no matter how idyllic, challenges and difficulties can arise. Philippe Jacquet & Associates are recognized, professional psychotherapist Marbella, counselors and life coaches. Assisting each client with holistic, integrated and customized treatments. We are professional psychotherapy Marbella, counselors and life coaches.

item.title: Psychotherapy Central London | Philippe Jacquet & Associates
item.description: London Psychotherapist Professional psychotherapy and counselling in Central London, offering confidential support for anxiety, stress, addiction, and relationship challenges. Our experienced therapists provide personalised, evidence-based care through in-person and online sessions, helping individuals and couples achieve lasting emotional wellbeing and clarity. Central London Eating Disorders, Bulimia and Anorexia Treatment Central London Addiction Counsellor Trauma Counselling in Central London Central London Couple Counselling & Therapist Maximizing Potential Through Executive Coaching Hypnotherapy services in London, UK Art Therapy in Central London Central London Therapy Professional psychotherapy and counselling services in the heart of London.

item.title: Psychotherapy Colchester Essex | Philippe Jacquet & Associates
item.description: Therapist Colchester - Philippe Jacquet & Associates Therapist Colchester Services in London Counselling | Colchester Essex Help with Eating Disorders | Anorexia | Bulimia Help With Addiction | Counselling Trauma Counselling Stress Counselling Colchester Bereavement Counselling Colchester Are you looking for psychotherapy Colchester and counselling ? Philippe Jacquet & Associates can help you through a holistic and integrated approach. The basics of therapist Colchester Many people feel nervous or anxious when considering a therapist in Colchester for the first time.

item.title: Therapist Bermondsey SE1 | Philippe Jacquet & Associates

item.title: Therapist in Bermondsey, SE1
item.description: Bermondsey sits at the edge of two worlds — the City’s pressure to the north, the quieter residential streets spreading south. People who live and work here carry a wide range of things: the strain of professional lives that look successful from the outside, the longer-standing difficulties that move with you wherever you go, and the specific kind of exhaustion that comes from keeping it all contained. Philippe Jacquet and Associates has a practice in Bermondsey offering the same depth and quality of clinical work as the Harley Street office — without the journey across the river.

item.title: Therapy & Coaching Services London | Philippe Jacquet
item.description: This page preserves the canonical URL from the master organigram.

item.title: Therapy at Harley Street
item.description: Harley Street has been synonymous with private medicine and specialist psychological care in London for over a century. Dr Jacquet’s practice has been located here since 2002. This is where the main practice is based - in discreet, accessible premises, just steps from Regent’s Park. The practice offers integrative psychotherapy and Jungian analysis, EMDR therapy, clinical hypnotherapy, art therapy, and executive coaching. Consultations are conducted in English and French. A Specialist Practice Dr Jacquet is an integrative psychotherapist and Jungian analyst with over 25 years of clinical experience in London and internationally.

item.title: Trauma Therapy London
item.description: Private trauma therapy in London for clients seeking careful, discreet and clinically grounded work with traumatic memory, shock, relational trauma and the continuing effects of overwhelming experience.
